commands.review_summary:
The PR changes chat-bash handling so `/bash` and bang commands inherit more configured `tools.exec` defaults, adds regression tests, and edits `CHANGELOG.md`.

PR surface: Source +44, Tests +173, Docs +1. Total +218 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main and the latest release create the chat-bash exec tool with timeout and notification defaults only, while the supported exec-default resolver owns the broader policy/default behavior. I did not run a live chat command because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can reuse the canonical exec-default resolver, remove release-owned changelog churn, preserve current-main fields, and add focused regression tests.

target.title: fix(chat-bash): inherit exec policy defaults
target.body:
## Summary
- repair #50392 so `/bash` chat sessions inherit the effective `tools.exec` defaults used by the exec tool
- include security, ask, path prepend, safe-bin settings/profiles, strict inline eval, approval running notice timing, timeout, and notification defaults where supported
- keep existing bash/elevated gates intact and avoid the bang-alias routing regression from #41598

## Credit
This repairs and carries forward the contributor work from @iron6909 in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/50392. It also preserves attribution for @updatedb's overlapping host/security/ask inheritance fix in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/41598.

## Review Notes
- Address Greptile findings on `execPolicy` consistency and `approvalRunningNoticeMs` forwarding.
- Address clawsweeper parity findings for the remaining exec defaults and focused regression coverage.

## Validation
- `pnpm check:changed`

ProjectClownfish replacement details:
- Cluster: ghcrawl-157029-autonomous-smoke
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/50392, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/41598
- Credit: Primary repair branch is #50392 by @iron6909: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/50392.; Preserve source attribution for @updatedb's overlapping host/security/ask inheritance work in #41598: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/41598.; Do not carry forward #41598's commands-bash markdown-image routing change unless it is reworked to preserve punctuation-prefixed bang commands.
- Validation: pnpm check:changed
- Repair fallback: To https://github.com/iron6909/openclaw.git
